description: Address semantic review findings: implement pre-merge key normalization, fix bool coercion to match old behavior, add nil guard, and add test coverage for multi-source conflicting key merge
steps: Implement normalizeData in decode.go with nil guard and recursive key normalization to lowercase snake_case
Update stringToBoolHookFunc to match old behavior: any string that is not 'true' (case-insensitive) produces false
Add test for normalizeData in decode_test.go
Add test for multi-source conflicting key merge in merge_test.go or read_logic_test.go
Update existing bool coercion tests if needed
Commit with message: fix: implement pre-merge key normalization and strict bool coercion
acceptance_criteria: normalizeData recursively normalizes map keys to lowercase snake_case before merge
normalizeData has nil guard at the top
stringToBoolHookFunc treats any non-true string as false (matching old rancher/mapper behavior)
Test exists verifying multi-source conflicting key normalization works correctly
